case_title: MICHAEL MAK VS. FARMERS GROUP, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-16-2015 CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-08-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-28-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-08-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAK, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS GROUP, INC. NUD-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY LEE, GRENT L. (AN INDIVIDUAL) DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-16-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-24-2015
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 58230759)
